title: WATKINS WELLNESS EXPANDS INTO SAUNA CATEGORY THROUGH THE ACQUISITION OF SAUNA360
text: Vista, California, July 31, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Watkins Wellness, a leader in hot tubs and aquatic fitness systems, today announced the expansion of its portfolio of personal well-being products and entry into the sauna category as a result of the pending acquisition of Sauna360 Group Oy (“Sauna360”) by Watkins Wellness' parent company, Masco Corporation. Sauna360 is a leading global manufacturer of sauna solutions, and its portfolio of products includes traditional, infrared, and wood-burning saunas as well as steam showers, rooms and generators. These products are sold primarily in the United States, Europe and throughout the rest of the world under the Tylö, Helo, Kastor, Finnleo, and Amerec brands. The transaction is expected to close in the third quarter, subject to regulatory approval.

title: Masco (MAS) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Masco (MAS) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.19 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.96 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.14 per share a year ago.

title: Masco Corporation Reports Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: LIVONIA, Mich.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Masco Corporation (NYSE: MAS), one of the world's leading manufacturers of branded home improvement and building products, reported its second quarter results. 2023 Second Quarter Results On a reported basis, compared to second quarter 2022: Net sales decreased 10 percent to $2,127 million; in local currency, net sales decreased 9 percent In local currency, North American sales decreased 10 percent and international sales decreased 8 percent Gross margin increas.

title: Masco: Continuing Uncertainty
text: Lack of revenue growth replaces inflation as the primary concern in my view. Masco's uncertainty may continue for the rest of the year as the Fed seems poised to increase rates further. Existing investors can generate extra income by selling covered calls, while new investors should wait for a lower valuation.

title: Soft Consumer Spending to Hurt Masco's (MAS) Q2 Earnings Y/Y
text: Masco's (MAS) second-quarter 2023 results are likely to reflect high interest rates, ongoing inflation, tight consumer spending and increased input cost on year-over-year basis.

title: Masco (MAS) Hits 52-Week High: What's Aiding its Growth?
